scripts.start: npm run edge:login && docker compose up -d db && npm run edge:up
scripts.start:with-logs: npm run edge:login && docker compose up -d db && npm run edge:up && docker compose -p plainid-edge -f edge/docker-compose/docker-compose.yaml logs -f
scripts.stop: docker compose down && docker compose -p plainid-edge -f edge/docker-compose/docker-compose.yaml down --remove-orphans --timeout 5
scripts.dev: npm run edge:login && docker compose up -d db && npm run edge:up && concurrently -n backend,frontend,edge -c blue,green,magenta "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:edge:logs"
scripts.dev:edge: npm run edge:login && npm run edge:up
scripts.dev:tunnel: npm run edge:login && docker compose up -d db && npm run edge:up && concurrently -n backend,frontend,edge,tunnel -c blue,green,magenta,yellow "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:edge:logs" "npm run dev:tunnel:backend"
scripts.dev:pull: npm run edge:login && npm run edge:pull && npm run edge:up
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
